name: Cookies and Cream Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cream-filled Cookies (e.g., chocolate cream filled)
1 1/4 cups Creme-filled Cookies (e.g., chocolate cream filled)
recipeInstructions:
1. The cookies should be chocolate cream filled and as fine as possible.
2. The creme-filled cookies should be coarsely chopped.
3. Combine cookie crumbs and margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
4. Soften gelatin in cold water; stir over low heat until dissolved.
5. Mix softened cream cheese and sugar on medium speed with an electric mixer until well blended.
6. Gradually add the gelatin mixture and milk, mixing until well combined.
7. Chill the mixture until it is thickened but not set.
8. Fold in whipped cream. Reserve 1 1/2 cups of the cream cheese mixture.
9. Pour the remaining cream cheese mixture over the crust.
10. Top with coarsely chopped creme-filled cookies and reserved cream cheese mixture.
11. Chill until firm.
